old: Emergency calls are no heat in winter, refrigerant leak, or smoke from equipment.
Non-emergency issues can be collected and scheduled next business day.
new: Emergency calls are no heat in winter, refrigerant leak, or smoke from equipment.
Non-emergency issues can be collected and scheduled next business day.
Emergency now includes no cooling for medical sites and smoke from units.

changes.old: Emergency calls are no heat in winter, refrigerant leak, or smoke from equipment.
changes.new: Emergency now includes no cooling for medical sites and smoke from units.

changes.old: Non-emergency issues can be collected and scheduled next business day.
If transfer fails after 50 seconds, apologize and assure fast dispatch callback.
changes.new: If no answer, apologize and confirm callback within 20 minutes.

changes.old: During office hours (Monday-Saturday 09:00 AM-05:30 PM MST), the agent greets the caller, collects purpose/name/number, and routes according to emergency rules.
changes.new: During office hours (Monday-Saturday 08:00 AM-06:00 PM MST), the agent greets the caller, collects purpose/name/number, and routes according to emergency rules.
